query:
INSERT INTO customers (externalId, name, businessName, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES 
  ('C9001', 'Nodo Newstead', 'Nodo Pty Ltd', 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('C9002', 'Nodo Grey Street', 'Nodo Pty Ltd', 'active', NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
